codeReview.summary: Implementation fully matches the feature contract: AGENTS template was added with the required heading and six sections, initRepo now scaffolds AGENTS.md without overwriting existing files, and repo tests cover creation, no-overwrite behavior, section presence, and WikiPage frontmatter fields.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit b7a8c8d. No blocking or non-blocking defects were found; requirements and expected behavior for agents-md-template are satisfied.
